original_statement: what is the total number of playoffs appearances from all teams?
mutated_statement: what is the total number of postseason participations from all entities that must be counted both once and not at all?
mutation_analysis: 实体替换 + 术语替换 + 范围/计数条件添加 + 语义矛盾: "teams" 被泛化为 "entities" (teams→entities) | "playoffs appearances" 替换为同义短语 "postseason participations" (playoffs appearances→postseason participations) | 增加计数限定短语 "that must be counted both once and not at all"（无此条件→that must be counted both once and not at all） | 范围从 "from all teams" 变为带矛盾条件的 "from all entities that must be counted both once and not at all" (from all teams→from all entities that must be counted both once and not at all)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，基于假设无视矛盾并合理化输出
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 与 after_refine 的说明可识别关键信息：judge_thought 明确将“counted both once and not at all” 解释为“appearances 等于1或0”，并列出 Anderson Packers、Cleveland Rebels、Sheboygan Red Skins 共计3；after_refine 返回 3。critique 虽指出 select_column 使用不当，但未针对语义矛盾要求澄清。agent 的具体表现是：未向用户询问或拒绝，直接基于单一假设（把矛盾短语视为包含两类实体：1次或0次）去筛选并汇总数据，最终给出结果。基于上述行为特征——识别到潜在矛盾但不提问或报错，而是通过自设假设将问题变为可解并据此输出——最符合分类标准中“无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令”之子类“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出（2.b）”。
